## 🧑‍💻 About Me

<!-- ANIMATED QUOTE SVG -->
<div align="center">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="700" alt="quote"/>
</div>

<br/>

<table>
<tr>
<td width="55%" valign="top">

🚀 &nbsp; **Software Developer** with a passion for scalable AI/Cloud systems  
☁️ &nbsp; Experienced with **AWS, Docker, CI/CD** and cloud-native deployments  
🤖 &nbsp; Hands-on with **LangChain, RAG, Generative AI** in production  
🔍 &nbsp; Strong QA background — **40+ test cases**, root cause analysis  
📊 &nbsp; Built NLP pipeline achieving **95% transcription accuracy**  
🌱 &nbsp; Currently learning **Generative AI for Software Dev** (DeepLearningAI)  
💬 &nbsp; Ask me about **Python, AWS, LangChain, CI/CD, QA automation**  
📍 &nbsp; Based in **Hyderabad, India**  
⚡ &nbsp; Fun fact: I debug faster than I make coffee ☕  

</td>

## 🚀 Featured Projects

<table>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

### 🎙️ Call Center Summarization AI

> **NLP · Python · LangChain · AWS**

Built a scalable pipeline for call transcription & summarization.

- ⚡ Reduced manual review time by **40%**
- 🎯 Achieved **95% accuracy** (Precision, Recall, F1)
- ☁️ Deployed on **AWS S3 + CloudWatch**
- 🔁 Continuous monitoring & improvement loop

![Python](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Python-FF9500?style=flat-square&logo=python&logoColor=white)
![LangChain](https://img.shields.io/badge/-LangChain-00D4FF?style=flat-square&logo=chainlink&logoColor=white)
![AWS](https://img.shields.io/badge/-AWS-FF9900?style=flat-square&logo=amazonaws&logoColor=white)
![NLP](https://img.shields.io/badge/-NLP-FF6B00?style=flat-square&logo=buffer&logoColor=white)

**[→ View Repository](https://github.com/Jswnt3)**

</td>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

### 🌾 Crop Recommendation System

> **ML · Flask · scikit-learn · REST API**

ML-based web application for intelligent crop recommendations.

- 🤖 End-to-end **ML prediction pipeline**
- 🧪 Structured test planning & functional testing
- 🐛 Defect reporting & root cause analysis
- 📱 Full UI testing for cross-module reliability

![Python](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Python-FF9500?style=flat-square&logo=python&logoColor=white)
![Flask](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Flask-000?style=flat-square&logo=flask&logoColor=white)
![scikit-learn](https://img.shields.io/badge/-scikit--learn-F7931E?style=flat-square&logo=scikitlearn&logoColor=white)
![Pandas](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Pandas-150458?style=flat-square&logo=pandas&logoColor=white)

**[→ View Repository](https://github.com/Jswnt3)**

</td>
</tr>
</table>

## 💼 Experience & Certifications

<table>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

### 🏢 Work Experience

**☁️ Cloud Engineering Intern**
🏛️ Magic Bus India Foundation
📅 Aug 2024 – Nov 2024 · Hyderabad, India

- 🤖 Contributed to **AI-powered chatbot (AGI/GenAI)** across Agile SDLC cycles
- 🧪 Designed & executed **40+ functional & regression test cases**
- 🔍 Root cause analysis & defect lifecycle management
- ✅ Validated **RAG pipelines**, retry logic & error handling
- 🐳 Leveraged **Docker, CI/CD** for deployment validation
- 📝 Technical documentation & cross-team collaboration
